description: Engine rule= contract violation (§51.0.F). Inside <Idle rule=.Loading>, a direct write @phaseTag = .Done targets a variant NOT in the from-state's rule= set (.Loading only). The compiler statically knows from-state == Idle (M4+M5+M12 co-location) and rejects the transition with E-ENGINE-INVALID-TRANSITION (the §34 error partition). Uses the SPEC-canonical bare .Variant write form.
rationale: §51.0.F the rule= attribute is a CONTRACT on writes; inside a state-child body the from-state is statically known, so a target not in rule= (and not the current variant) is rejected at compile time.
